fields.name: engine
fields.description: Engine that produced this result (chatgpt, perplexity, gemini, claude).

fields.name: query
fields.description: The buyer-intent query sent to the engine.

fields.name: cited
fields.description: Whether the domain appeared in any citation returned by the engine.

fields.name: citation_rank
fields.description: 1-indexed position of the first citation matching the domain. null if not cited.

fields.name: citation_url
fields.description: The specific URL cited (first match). null if not cited.

fields.name: all_citation_urls
fields.description: All URLs from this domain that appeared in citations.

fields.name: total_citations
fields.description: Total number of source URLs the engine returned for this query.

fields.name: response_truncated
fields.description: True if the engine hit the token limit.
